issues.description: Evidence gathering aborted at 'partial_honesty_abort' before independent test verification could run. All verification fields (tests, independent_tests, coverage_details, bdd, plan_audit, arch_review, requirements) are null. Cannot verify any acceptance criteria without independent evidence.
issues.suggestion: Fix the honesty discrepancies (especially the critical formatting issue in AC-001's test_file field) and re-submit so full evidence gathering can complete with independent test verification.

issues.description: Critical honesty discrepancy: completion_promise for AC-001 specifies test_file as 'tests/integration/test_store_semantics.py, tests/integration/test_pool_lifecycle.py' (comma-separated string). The honesty checker tried to validate this as a literal path, which doesn't exist. The test_file field should contain a single path or an array, not a comma-separated string.
issues.suggestion: Use separate completion_promise entries for each test file, or use an array structure if the schema supports it. Do not use comma-separated values in a string field.

issues.description: 8 should-fix honesty discrepancies: Player claimed files in files_modified/files_created that show no changes in git status. These include orchestrator-managed paths (.claude/task-plans/), duplicate worktree paths, and unchanged files (test_output.txt). This pollutes the report with false claims.
issues.suggestion: Clean up files_modified/files_created to include only files actually modified this turn. Exclude: .claude/task-plans/ (orchestrator-managed), duplicate worktree/relative paths, and unchanged files.

issues.description: Advisory issue: task-work produced report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing Phase 3 (Implementation) specialist. Without stack-specific specialists, test quality may be compromised.
issues.suggestion: Invoke the appropriate testing-specific specialist agents during implementation to ensure stack-aligned test patterns.

Cannot verify - no independent test run available (gathering_status: partial_honesty_abort). Player claims ASSUM-004 verified with 15 concurrent operations completing successfully, but no independent evidence to confirm actual psycopg-pool behavior was observed.

rationale: Evidence gathering aborted at 'partial_honesty_abort' stage before any independent verification could run (tests, coverage, BDD, plan audit all null). The critical honesty discrepancy (invalid comma-separated test_file format in AC-001 completion_promise) triggered the abort. Without independent test verification, I cannot confirm any acceptance criteria are met - the Player's self-reported test results cannot be validated. Per GATHERING-STATUS GUARD: gathering_status != 'complete' means all null fields are ABSENT SIGNAL, not passing results. Additionally, 8 should-fix path claims indicate report quality issues. Player must fix honesty discrepancies and re-submit for full evidence gathering with independent verification.
